add.title: New Pokemon
add.full: Your pokebox is full. Subscribe for more server storage

edit.title: Edit Pokemon
edit.full: Your pokebox is overflowing. Resubscribe or delete excess Pokemon

errors.parse: Pasted data was not a supported format. Please make sure to include a header row.
errors.level: $t(pokeform.level.label) is not  is not a number between 1 and 41
errors.individualAttack: $t(pokeform.individualAttack.label) is not a number between 0 and 15.
errors.individualDefense: $t(pokeform.individualDefense.label) is not a number between 0 and 15
errors.individualStamina: $t(pokeform.individualStamina.label) is not a number between 0 and 15

verify.title: Verify
verify.helpBody: Select the Pokémon to verify, copy the search string, paste it into Pokémon GO's box search, screenshot the result, then upload it here. Verification costs {{coins}} coins and lasts {{days}} days — re-scans are free while it's active.
verify.helpBodyVerified: Your account is verified. Select Pokémon, copy the search string, screenshot your filtered box in Pokémon GO, and upload — re-scans are free while your verification is active.
verify.searchStringCopied: Search string copied — paste it into Pokémon GO's box search, then screenshot.
verify.noPermission: Photo library permission is needed to upload your screenshot.
verify.noneMatched: The server couldn't match any selected Pokémon in that screenshot. Clear nicknames, make sure the CP is visible, and try again.

noPokemon.title: No Pokemon Found
noPokemon.description: Pokebattler Raid Party requires you to add your best Pokemon in order to find the best counters! The more you add, the more accurate the raid party suggestions will be!
noPokemon.addPokemon: The fastest way to add Pokemon is by clicking the plus button on the boss counters page. You can also add Pokemon one by one or by using the bulk import functionality.
